title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Malls

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Malls
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Nexus Malls in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
